articles.title: China’s Moonshot Plans IPO in Six Months After AI Breakthrough - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Moonshot AI has told investors it’s preparing to list in as early as six months, seizing the opportunity to tap capital markets after its latest model upended industry perceptions of China’s burgeoning capabilities and sent global tech stocks reeling.
